title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates in Chandigarh offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates:
Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates!
